limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or named vendor/infrastructure partnerships disclosed in excerpts; only generic references to 'significant investment' required.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Excerpts are predominantly risk-factor sections; no business-section detail on named AI initiatives, deployment status, or metrics was present beyond a single general statement about incorporating AI into processes.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-factor sections are well-represented; scored 4 because multiple company-specific risk mechanisms are described (cyber via agentic AI, regulatory/litigation exposure, employee misuse, reputational harm from inaccurate AI outputs) with operational pathways, though no quantification or named governance body was disclosed.
